expectations.text: The review identifies SQL injection as a Critical finding
expectations.evidence: F1 [Critical/Real] -- SQL Injection via string interpolation in all queries

expectations.text: The review identifies at least 4 distinct findings total
Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: F1-F2 Critical, F3-F7 High, F8-F9 Medium, F10 Low

expectations.text: Each finding includes a file location reference
expectations.evidence: Every finding has a Location: line with file:line references

expectations.text: The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
expectations.evidence: All findings use F1 [Critical/Real], F2 [Critical/Real], etc.

expectations.text: The review identifies the missing/empty test stubs as a finding
expectations.evidence: F8 [Medium/Real] -- Tests lack coverage for critical paths. Mentions DELETE tests contain only a TODO comment.

expectations.text: The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
expectations.evidence: Agent stated 'the Agent tool was not available' and performed inline review instead. The skill's fallback was used rather than true information asymmetry.
